ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEMURRER TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND PLAINTIFF'S EMOTIONAL DISTRESS.
